questions.q: According to an Ipsos poll, what percentage of Canadians want the federal Liberals to win a majority in the upcoming byelections?
What was Amazon CEO Andy Jassy's total compensation in 2025?
After the failure of Iran peace talks, what action did Trump state the U.S. would take regarding the Strait of Hormuz?
What security group has claimed responsibility for the hack on Rockstar Games, demanding a ransom by April 14th?
Where did the IRAN-US talks that concluded on April 11, 2026, take place?
According to Palantir CEO Alex Karp, which two types of individuals are most likely to thrive in the age of AI?
options: Those with vocational training and the neurodivergent
questions.correctText: Those with vocational training and the neurodivergent

questions.q: As of April 10, 2026, what was the worldwide gross of "The Super Mario Galaxy Movie"?
According to JD Vance, what was the primary reason for the failure of the U.S.-Iran talks on April 12, 2026?
options: Iran’s refusal to give up its nuclear programme
questions.correctText: Iran’s refusal to give up its nuclear programme

questions.q: Analysis of over 400,000 Reddit posts on GLP-1 medications revealed potential side effects not captured in clinical trials. Which of the following was NOT among the reported side effects?
questions.correctText: Gallbladder issues were not explicitly mentioned as a side effect in the analysis of Reddit posts, though gastrointestinal issues were common.

questions.q: According to a recent study, summers in the midlatitudes, including much of North America and Europe, now last approximately how much longer than they did in the 1960s?
questions.correctText: Summers in the midlatitudes now last roughly 30 days longer than they did in the 1960s.
